summary: Completed testing of KPI MetricCard click-to-expand feature, tooltip on hover, and optimization apply error handling. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height). Non-blocking but could be cleaned up.

kpi_card_click_to_expand.description: MetricCard components expand on click showing formula and numeric breakdown

kpi_card_collapse.description: Clicking an expanded card collapses it back to normal state

kpi_card_tooltip_on_hover.description: Tooltip appears on hover showing formula and 'Clic para ver desglose' text
kpi_card_tooltip_on_hover.tooltip_content: Shows formula (e.g., 'EBITDA / Ingresos') and instruction text

working_capital_card_breakdown.description: Capital de Trabajo card ($9,357,181) shows breakdown with Activo Circulante and Pasivo Circulante

backend_metrics_components.description: All metrics return 'components' array with {label, value} objects

seed_data_creation: None - used existing financial data for period 2024-03
context_for_next_testing_agent: KPI MetricCard feature fully implemented. Cards use data-testid='metric-card-{key}' and expanded breakdown uses data-testid='metric-breakdown-{key}'. Tooltip uses Shadcn/Radix Tooltip with 300ms delay. Backend returns 'components' array for each metric with {label, value} objects. Optimization apply endpoint properly returns 400 for missing mejor_solucion and 404 for non-existent optimization.
